TCode.r2rml4net.CLI 0.8.0
2012-2020 Tomasz Pluskiewicz

  direct             Transform entire database using Direct Mapping

  rml                (Default Verb) Generate triples from R2RML mappings

  default-mapping    Generate a default mapping graph

  help               Display more information on a specific command.

  version            Display version information.

commands.payload:
TCode.r2rml4net.CLI 0.8.0
2012-2020 Tomasz Pluskiewicz

  direct             Transform entire database using Direct Mapping

  rml                (Default Verb) Generate triples from R2RML mappings

  default-mapping    Generate a default mapping graph

  help               Display more information on a specific command.

  version            Display version information.

result.stderr:
TCode.r2rml4net.CLI 0.8.0
2012-2020 Tomasz Pluskiewicz

  -c, --connection-string    Required. Database connection string

  -b, --base-uri             (Default: http://r2rml.net/base/) Base URI used for
                             when generating triples as well as parsing the
                             mapping graphs

  -v, --verbose              Enables verbose console output

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

  --version                  Display version information.

result.stderr:
TCode.r2rml4net.CLI 0.8.0
2012-2020 Tomasz Pluskiewicz

  --preserve-duplicate-rows    (Default: false) Enable to generate duplicate
                               blank node subjects rows in direct mapping

  -o, --output                 Output file path. Overwrites existing file.
                               Creates directories if necessary.

  -e, --endpoint               SPARQL Update Endpoint to write generated quads

  --user                       Endpoint user name

  --pass                       Endpoint password

  --batch-size                 (Default: 1000)

  -c, --connection-string      Required. Database connection string

  -b, --base-uri               (Default: http://r2rml.net/base/) Base URI used
                               for when generating triples as well as parsing
                               the mapping graphs

  -v, --verbose                Enables verbose console output

  --help                       Display this help screen.

  --version                    Display version information.

  --user                     Endpoint user name

  --pass                     Endpoint password

  --batch-size               (Default: 1000)

  -c, --connection-string    Required. Database connection string

                             when generating triples as well as parsing the
                             mapping graphs

  -v, --verbose              Enables verbose console output

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
